title: Hands-on with Headlamp: The Kubernetes UI

resources.title: Headlamp website
resources.evidence_quote: Yeah. So the entry point to Headlamp is our website, the headlamp.dev.

resources.title: Headlamp documentation
resources.evidence_quote: We have a documentation, of course, for all of this, so we would recommend you to go through the docs and install the hat on that way.

resources.title: Artifact Hub Headlamp plugin registry
resources.evidence_quote: So we use Artifact Hub as a place, as a registry for plugins, and you can publish your own plugins here, and you can very easily install them.
